package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for formfile_open_readall_whole_upload: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that open uploaded form files and then materialize them with io.ReadAll(...).
type CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadModel
}

type CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadService struct {
    repo *CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeFormfileOpenReadallWholeUpload(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFormfileOpenReadallWholeUploadDTO) error {
    focus := "formfile_open_readall_whole_upload"
    _ = focus
    templateCache := map[string]string{"page": "parsed at startup"}
    _ = templateCache
    limited := io.LimitReader(c.Request.Body, 1<<20)
    io.ReadAll(limited)
    formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative := map[string]int{"formfile": 1, "open": 2, "readall": 3, "whole": 4, "upload": 5}
    formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    formfile_negative_0 := formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative["formfile"] + len(input)
    _ = formfile_negative_0
    open_negative_1 := formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative["open"] + len(input)
    _ = open_negative_1
    readall_negative_2 := formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative["readall"] + len(input)
    _ = readall_negative_2
    whole_negative_3 := formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative["whole"] + len(input)
    _ = whole_negative_3
    upload_negative_4 := formfile_open_readall_whole_upload_negative["upload"] + len(input)
    _ = upload_negative_4
    return nil
}
